title: sphaerocephalus cephalotes
intro: Sphaerocephalus cephalotes, also known as the shrubby cinquefoil, is a perennial herb belonging to the Rosaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which help to treat wounds and skin issues. The health benefits of Sphaerocephalus cephalotes include reducing swelling, promoting tissue repair, and treating fungal infections, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as in topical creams and ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
